name: Adventure Learner
description: A student training to become an explorer, scholar, and other adventure-related jobs. Reports new discoveries to the guild and receives awards.

name: Trade Learner
description: A student training to become a merchant, account, and other trade-related jobs. Earns large amounts of wealth by delivering goods from one place to another.

name: Military Learner
description: A student training to become an admiral, pirate, and other battle-related jobs. Earns prize money and booty by defeating enemy ships.

name: Explorer
description: Job class that excels at sailing long distances. Good at responding to danger.

name: Accountant
description: Good at handling goods that are subject to high price fluctuations.

name: Mercenary
description: Soldiers who take on requests from various nations. Good at short distance cannon firing and Melee battle.

name: Excavator
description: Excavates the land to unearth ancient relics and other buried treasure.

name: Surveyor
description: Travels the land and sea to make geographic discoveries.

name: Chef
description: A skilled cook who gathers and processes all ingredients.

name: Trade Merchant
description: A merchant who makes a comfortable living buying and selling daily goods.

name: Bodyguard
description: Earns a living protecting people. They have very high Defence Power and Recovery.

name: Brigand
description: Attacks and steals booty from ships belonging to various nations. Good at handling galley-type ships.

name: Cartographer
description: A specialist who has very good knowledge of the world and the oceans.

name: Historian
description: Specialises in discovering/researching historical ruins and ancient relics.

name: Chandler
description: A sailor who makes a living by transporting weapons and ammunition.

name: Treasure Hunter
description: Travels the globe in search for valuable artistic pieces and treasures.

name: Foods Dealer
description: A merchant who deals in food. Also good at producing and processing food.

name: Yarn Dealer
description: A merchant who deals yarn-related goods. Also good at producing and processing clothing.

name: Mineral Trader
description: A merchant who deals in things that are mined. Also good at producing and processing gold.

name: Priest
description: A high-ranking clergyman who travels the earth in search of religious relics.

name: Privateer
description: A pirate employed under private contracts with various nations. Relentlessly attacks ships belonging to other countries.

name: Bounty Hunter
description: Hunts down pirates for rewards. Excels in naval and combat skills.

name: Ocean Explorer
description: An explorer who fulfils all the requirements for long distance ocean travel.

name: Biologist
description: Searches for unknown life forms and ancient fossils.

name: Archaeologist
description: Travels the globe in search of ancient relics.

quests.name: Treasure of the kings of Troy

name: Fisher
description: A sailor who travels the oceans in search of fishing spots.

name: Surgeon
description: Job class that specialises in healing crew members.

name: Money Trader
description: A merchant who deals in precious metals. Their knowledge can play a role in production.

name: Jeweller
description: A merchant who deals in precious stones. Their knowledge can play a role in production.

name: Art Dealer
description: A merchant who deals in art. Their knowledge can play a role in production.

name: Medicine Trader
description: A merchant who deals in medicines. They possess vast knowledge in medicine.

name: Alchemist
description: Their experiments in trying to change base metals into gold make them search for various mystical solutions.

name: Interpreter
description: An expert in communication and negotiation who studies various foreign languages.

quests.name: To relay the will of the forefathers

name: Arms Dealer
description: A merchant who deals in weapons. Their knowledge can play a role in production.

name: Senior Officer
description: An experienced ship captain who travels the world's oceans to fight pirates and enemies.

name: Tactician
description: A professional that has great knowledge of naval tactics. Can also produce weapons and ships.

name: Cannoneer
description: A specialist who possesses great knowledge about cannons.

name: Pirate
description: A great pirate that travels across oceans to terrorize its prey.

name: Swordfighter
description: A swordfighter who specialises in boarding ships and in Melee battle.

name: Naturalist
description: One who seeks to learn everything that exists in the world.

name: Great Adventurer
description: An explorer that directs his ship dreaming of reaching the farthest corners of the world.

quests.name: A bird like an over-fat goose

name: Millionaire
description: A master trader in luxury goods and a heavyweight of the financial world that deals with a wide range of businesses.

name: Spice Trader
description: A merchant who deals in spices. Their knowledge can play a role in production.

name: Grand Admiral
description: A demon as an enemy, a guardian deity as an ally. A stalwart power of the nation.

name: Ranger
description: A specialist who explores lands no man has traversed before. They research unknown life forms and habitats.

quests.name: A long journey to link dreams

name: Artist
description: One who pursues the true meaning of beauty and studies cultural activities. Excels in art, handicrafts, and music.

name: Patissier
description: A craftsman of confectionaries. Can also make flavourings and liquor.

name: Tailor
description: An expert in tailoring. Can make traditional and modern style clothing.

name: Blacksmith
description: An expert in creating armour and firearms.

name: Artisan
description: A craftsman capable of creating various handicrafts based on various cultures of the world.

name: Scout
description: Being nimble, a scout delivers messages from various frontlines to their friends and allies.

quests.name: The first step to defeating pirates

name: Supply Corps
description: A team dedicated to quickly replenishing the battle capabilities of the main ship.

name: Sword Master
description: A fighter who is a master of spears and swords.

name: Guerilla
description: A specialist in guerrilla warfare. Able to use throwing weapons.

name: Musketeer
description: A professional marksman who can shoot targets standing afar. Good with various firearms.

name: Filibuster
description: A dangerous pirate that preys on sailors. The name itself is enough to strike fear into anyone travelling the seas.

name: Salvager
description: Adventurers who search and explore sunken ships. They have very strong adventure and exploration skills.

name: Sommelier
description: A craftsman who handles and makes various liquors.

quests.name: Only the finest satisfy the noble
The depths of the wines of the world

name: Adventurer Mentor
description: A job class that enables one to teach adventure courses.

name: Merchant Mentor
description: A job class that enables one to teach merchant courses.

name: Maritime Mentor
description: A job class that enables one to teach maritime courses.

name: Animal Trader
description: A merchant that deals in farm animals. Also good at producing and processing foods.

name: Helmsperson
description: With vast knowledge of navigation, they excel at handling ships.

name: Folklorist
description: One who studies customs and traditions of various cultures for a living.

quests.name: The new research of the scholar

name: Artificer
description: A job class that relies entirely on self-sufficiency. Able to make items used for daily use as well as military items.

quests.name: The chance to show the skill

name: Political Merchant
description: A merchant who uses their wealth to influence politics.

name: Caravanner
description: A merchant who carries many goods by camel. Used in raids, they are capable land fighters.

name: Master Alchemist
description: A scholar that has given up worldly customs to study alchemy. Possesses vast knowledge and able to utilize high technologies.

name: Ruin Explorer
description: Specialist who searches the interior of ruins. Well-versed in exploration knowledge and trap use.

name: Pharmacist
description: Merchant who also possesses a specialization in medicines. Familiar with and skilled in the effective use of various tools.

name: Light Soldier
description: Lightly-armed soldier that nimbly moves around and trifles with opponent. Excels in both the use of swords and throwing weapons.

name: Court Gardener
description: Adventurer that collects the world's plants. Has a wealth of knowledge in botany and exploration. Also known as the 'Plant hunter'

name: Tea Merchant
description: Merchant that specializes in the handling of tea. Has a wealth of knowledge in all luxuries. Skilled in processing and preservation.

name: Marine Corps
description: Occupation that carries out melee battles with high level of organization. Has high level of leadership and battle skills

name: Astronomer
description: Profession that specializes in the study of stars and astronomical phenomenon.

quests.name: At the end of the Caribbean

name: Steam Engineer
description: An engineer which applies the state of the art, steam engine technology for various uses.

name: Breeder
description: A Job specializing in taking care of animals and pets. Those who have this job also have a wide variety of knowledge in regards to animals, food, and nature.

name: High Seeker
description: An experienced great adventurer sailing around in hopes of traveling to every corner of the world.

name: Business Tycoon
description: A business person who is widely successful in trading, especially regarding Luxury Goods.

name: High Commander
description: A national hero who is described as the 'fierce god' as well as the 'guardian of the sea.'

name: Capitano
description: Merchant who commands the galley trade ship fleet. Mainly handles light-weight expensive goods.

name: Viking
description: Name for the armed group mainly active in Northern Europe. Making effective use of their environment, they excel in both battle and trade.

name: Gladiator
description: Warriors who fight to the death for the audience. They can adapt to many different fighting styles.

name: Military Scientist
description: Scholars who conduct studies on military science such as tactics and weapons.
